body.title: CLOSED: Inhibitor-fires counter: emit COHERENCE_INHIBITOR_STUCK after 3 fires
body.result: Implementation was already complete; added 3 missing tests (stuck after 3 fires, 4th fire suppression, independent thread counters). Commit c743e2c0.
body.description:
Pass-2 area_2 finding: response_coherence_inhibitor fires silently with no escalation when stuck. Add per-thread_id counter; after 3 fires in a 10-minute window, emit COHERENCE_INHIBITOR_STUCK to channel and suppress further auto-corrections for that thread.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/response_coherence_inhibitor.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** IN — in-process counter (dict keyed by thread_id + TTL expiry), channel emit on N=3. OUT — changing detection logic.
**Test plan:** test_response_coherence_inhibitor.py: mock time, fire inhibitor 3x for same thread, assert channel.send called with COHERENCE_INHIBITOR_STUCK; 4th fire is suppressed.
**Pass condition:** Firing inhibitor 3 times in tests produces exactly one COHERENCE_INHIBITOR_STUCK channel message and suppresses the 4th correction.
